untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Implied Volatility Percentile (not available in indicator list; approximated with india_vix), (2) Days To Expiration tracking (not available; requires external calendar logic), (3) Option spread wing construction and time decay modeling (requires derivatives pricing engine, not supported by price/technical indicators alone), (4) Position sizing relative to max profit/loss of spread legs (requires options payoff calculation), (5) Pyramid entry logic based on spread profitability (requires options P&L tracking). The core strategy is options-specific and cannot be fully expressed using only equity price and technical indicators.
